name: Periodic reporting commitment

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 11 (periodic reporting on E/S characteristic attainment or sustainable investment objective attainment)
Annex IV (Article 8 periodic disclosure template); Annex V (Article 9 periodic disclosure template)

summary: Tests whether the developer-entity has committed to and operationalised the SFDR Article 11 periodic reporting obligation: annual disclosure of the extent to which the promoted E/S characteristic (Art 8) or sustainable investment objective (Art 9) has been attained, against the disclosed pre-contractual template.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), periodic reporting is expected to be retained and harmonised across the new category labels. PB Art 8/Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
